sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for this fighting game

special_mechanics.name: Rage Gauge
special_mechanics.description: Similar to the spirit system of the predecessor; limits the use and effectiveness of special attacks. Players must build and manage rage to perform Desperation Moves and taunts

special_mechanics.name: Desperation Moves
special_mechanics.description: Special character-dependent super moves that can be used strategically when rage gauge allows; each character has unique initialization requirements

special_mechanics.name: Super Death Blow
special_mechanics.description: Character-specific super special move; bonus stage adapted for each character's technique

tier_notes: Tier 2 (T2) - Empirical/qualitative data. Art of Fighting 2 is a 2D fighting game where precise movement parameters are not typically documented in standard game documentation. The game focuses on fighting mechanics (range, combos, special moves) rather than platformer physics. No technical movement parameters found in Wikipedia source.
